name: ` Forsaken Gang - {ESCAPING?}
description:
ೃ ✿𓈒ॱ⬭ᩙ —Summary: You guys (the survivors) find an old car in the woods and Builderman fixes it up. You (YES YOU🫵) propose to the group that everyone get in and you try and escape this god forsaken place. So now here you are, all crammed together in the car as Elliot speeds down the road. That is, until a certain someone literally falls the fuck off.

My first bot!!! Yay!!!

It’s up to you if you want to ride in the car, or if you’re sticking out of the top. Hell you can even fall off for all I care .>.

• ADDED KILLER DESCRIPTIONS!
